input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing tests that import org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, or TypedProps will not compile against 2.0.0-M1 because those classes are no longer present in the resolved artifact.

Generated fixes should exercise supported Pekko classic actor APIs such as ActorSystem, Props, Actor, serialization, DynamicAccess, or configuration rather than trying to restore removed TypedActor coverage with another dependency.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed; pekko-actor_2.13 is an in-process actor library whose 2.0.0-M1 artifact only depends on scala-library and typesafe config. The observed failure is caused by tests using deprecated TypedActor APIs that are absent from 2.0.0-M1, not by missing setup.
